name: Harry Shearer
abstract: Harry Julius Shearer (born December 23, 1943) is an American actor, comedian, musician, radio host, writer, and producer. Born in Los Angeles, California, Shearer began his career as a child actor.

concerts.label: Toyota Comedy Festival: Spinal Tap: Back from the Dead
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
about_quotes.evidence: And we had Harry Shearer, we had a bunch of artists. And it was killer. Hand picked a big band, we rehearsed.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Torkanowsky interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 26, 2019

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Frishberg
about_quotes.evidence: I like Christopher Guest and Harry Shearer, the guys that did “Spinal Tap,”
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Frishberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001
